div.p: Cache-line aligned for optimal memory access
Total: 64 bytes (one cache line) Aligned to 64-byte boundary for cache efficiency. No false sharing with adjacent structures.
Size 8 bytes 4 bytes 4 bytes 8 bytes 8 bytes 8 bytes 8 bytes 8 bytes 4 bytes 4 bytes
user_data (8B) Application identifier for callback matching. Copied from SQE to CQE for request correlation.
file_index (4B) Index into registered file descriptor table. Enables O(1) kernel file lookup via IOSQE_FIXED_FILE.
start_offset / current_offset (8B each) start_offset: Original requested file position. current_offset: Updated after short reads for resubmission.
total_requested / bytes_completed (8B each) Track partial read progress across short reads. Resubmit when bytes_completed < total_requested.
buffer_ptr (8B) Pointer to fixed buffer from registered pool. MUST NOT be reused while operation is in-flight.
status / error_code (4B each) State machine: PENDING → PARTIAL → COMPLETE/ERROR. Negative errno stored on failure for diagnostics.
